# Quaternius Medieval Village — reviewed building subset

Source: <https://quaternius.com/packs/medievalvillage.html>  
Official distribution: <https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/18T92VcNldHG0ugWo1u0hSJGDLua-n7o5?usp=sharing>  
Upstream release: December 2020  
License: CC0 1.0 Universal; see `License.txt`.

Only the ten FBX buildings used or suitable for the compact conquest arena were imported. Blender
sources, OBJ duplicates, and the full prop library were intentionally omitted.

|---|---|

| Blacksmith.fbx | `bee01a36a4cfaef62277e4f87fd6ba22db6a3a75814d93c43c700799c89debd0` |
| House_1.fbx | `437024abc6b756f859b69844b644c4bdbc3178c759af900f40d913f34ffce536` |
| House_2.fbx | `e11cb0d7e14be92e7269973b764fca0e55c064ad15a22994eab719d31fb5c527` |
| House_3.fbx | `42a853231116c948f42ed0106b6599f9ba212e23ba6bd5a989e1a7161dcefaa1` |
| House_4.fbx | `aeb5402bfa482dbf142a049ebc396ffc44824dc1a260a3a289df01875936ab01` |

| Mill.fbx | `8f2d20be4364fccfa1638ea7ed2c3861c2845fe84942519f06180066a18cc3b7` |
| Sawmill.fbx | `91f172546c3137c8b9f5ee5e5ec14a33ad54835d0769643fe09927602dc93dfb` |

| License.txt | `83d8959f9fc56353ed571fbe2dc52e4bcd64508e2399501cd45ac2ce3df0bf8c` |

The presentation resolver currently uses Bell Tower for strongholds, Inn for settlements, and
Blacksmith for resource works. Procedural geometry remains the deterministic fallback.
